UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user account information and preferences.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

InterviewSession.title: Interview Session
InterviewSession.description: Stores details of a single mock interview session.

userId.description: ID of the user who conducted the interview.

transcript.description: List of messages in the interview.

questions.description: List of questions generated for the interview.

duration.description: Duration of the interview in seconds.

score.description: Overall score awarded for the session.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the session was created.
